




name: Helloworld
# when to trigger this pipeline. We can trigger on push or manual or some other events like creating PR, updating PR, creating branches, creating issues.
on: [push] #triggers
jobs: # Pipeline. One workflow can have multiple pipelines.
  hello:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest # Linux OS. We can have windows on MAC
    steps: # stages
      - name: step1
        run: echo "Hello world"
      - name: step2
        run: echo "Hello Github Actions"

raoli@LAPTOP-VCM4BOUV MINGW64 /c/devops/daws-78s/linga-repos/14.1.github-actions
$ git init
Initialized empty Git repository in C:/devops/daws-78s/linga-repos/14.1.github-actions/.git/

raoli@LAPTOP-VCM4BOUV MINGW64 /c/devops/daws-78s/linga-repos/14.1.github-actions (master)
$ git branch -M main

raoli@LAPTOP-VCM4BOUV MINGW64 /c/devops/daws-78s/linga-repos/14.1.github-actions (main)
$ git remote add origin https://github.com/lingadevops-actions/14.1.github-actions.git

raoli@LAPTOP-VCM4BOUV MINGW64 /c/devops/daws-78s/linga-repos/14.1.github-actions (main)
$ git add .;git commit -m  "github actions helloworld"; git push -u origin main
